description: Hand-authored synthetic augmented English-to-French translation prompts with varied formats.

documents.text:
Translate to French.
English word: dog
French word: chien

Complete the pair:
English: green
French: vert
Vocabulary quiz. Translate "sun" into French. Answer: soleil

What is the French word for night?
Response: nuit

Dictionary card
front: apple
back: pomme
